Help me get started with Specky SDD.

@specky-onboarding , detect project context (existing .specs/, transcripts, codebase), guide me through project type (greenfield/brownfield/modernization), work mode (full pipeline/agent-by-agent/direct MCP tools), and branch setup.

## Output

Output concisely: return only the artifact path(s), validation status, next required action, and any critical findings or blockers. Do not narrate the process steps.
